identity.name: E1_Anti_AI
identity.mission: Redesign Appeal Case Manager to be bold, impressive, and emotionally resonant.
identity.emotional_tone: Hope in Darkness. Authority meets Empathy.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Legal Authority mixed with Editorial Elegance.
Emotion First: Every screen must convey 'Competence' and 'Calm'.
Content is King: Direct the user's attention using 'Bento' grids and 'Focus' modes.
Zoom In: Use bold typography and generous whitespace.
Negative Space: Do not cram. Let the content breathe.

rules: Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px.

usage.primary_brand: #1E1B4B (Deep Indigo) - Use for Sidebar, Heavy Headers, Key Actions.
usage.accent_brand: #B45309 (Burnished Amber) - Use for 'Call to Action', 'Hope' moments, Highlights.

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium shadow-md
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium

inputs.base: bg-background border-border focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary rounded-lg px-4 py-3 transition-all

landing_page.hero_section: Split screen or Center Focus. Large Serif Headline. 'Trust' imagery.
landing_page.features_section: Bento Grid layout for features. Do not use 3-column generic layout.
landing_page.social_proof: Marquee or Masonry grid of testimonials.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Collapsible). Top Bar for Global Search/Profile.
dashboard.content_area: Bento Grid for Overview. Data visualization using Recharts (customized to be minimal).

case_detail.solution: Tabbed Interface or Vertical Navigation. Separate 'Overview', 'Timeline', 'Documents', 'Strategy'.
case_detail.focus_mode: When viewing a document or report, hide non-essential navigation.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use on sticky headers, modals, and toasts. 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80'.
visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise texture overlay to the entire app body (opacity 0.03) to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.gradients: No full-screen gradients. Use subtle 'mesh' gradients in backgrounds of cards or hero sections. #1E1B4B to #312E81.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. REFRACTORING: The Case Detail page is too heavy. Break it down into tabs or sub-routes (Overview, Timeline, Docs, Notes).
2. NAVIGATION: Implement a robust Sidebar for the Dashboard area. It should be collapsible.
3. TYPOGRAPHY: Update 'index.css' to enforce Crimson Pro for headings and Manrope for body. Remove any 'Inter' references if they exist.
4. COMPONENTS: Update Shadcn components (Card, Button, Input) in 'components/ui' to match the new 'Jewel' aesthetic (more rounding, subtle borders, richer hover states).
5. DARK MODE: Ensure all colors have a dark mode variant. The dark mode should not be 'pure black', use Slate-950 (#020617).
6. LANDING PAGE: Redesign completely using the 'Swiss Grid' approach. Use the provided image URLs for visual interest.
7. BENTO GRID: Use the bento grid class structure provided in 'grids' for the main Dashboard overview.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Use 2-3x more spacing (p-8, gap-8) than typical.
Every interaction needs a micro-animation (transition-all duration-200).
Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Use specific properties.
Ensure high contrast for accessibility (APCA standards).
